A classic retelling of what would happen if the original Jack and the Beanstalk caused generational hatred spanning decades. Told through the lens of a long descendent of the Giant himself.

༺═─────────────────═༻

༺═─────────────────═༻

QUICK INFO DUMP!

Terlkazar is a nation ruled by Empirical Goverments. There are rulers for different Regions and/or Species but rulers tend to be Direct Descendants of the War God. The War god is very involved with the continent, and so are his children. Terlkazar is renowned for its Warriors, Contract slavery system and long Legacy of heroes and epics. While all mortals can live here, their are some Native mortals like gaints, Orcs and Djinns that where created by the War god or his/her children. Tigers serve as the national animal for being natural powerful, strong and Regal.

Nobility includes any Red Eye mortals, descendants of the War God or any foreigner who can buy their way in.

Giants have been murdered down to a low population. To escape the Jack royal family, the last of the giants used a beanstalk to create civilization in the clouds. But the giants died out, leaving just one left.
